ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 导出日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the selected word count in the status bar next to Obsidian's built-in word count.
ast.target: 在状态栏中 Obsidian 内置字数统计旁显示选定字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Update the status bar count automatically when text is selected. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 选择文本时自动更新状态栏计数。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide Obsidian's built-in word count when the selected word count is enabled. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 启用选定字数统计时隐藏 Obsidian 内置字数统计。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the label shown before the count in the status bar. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 自定义状态栏中计数前显示的标签。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display character count alongside word count in the modal.
ast.target: 在模态框中同时显示字符数和字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how characters are counted. (Requires character count to be enabled)
ast.target: 选择字符计数方式。（需要启用字符计数）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display sentence count alongside word count in the modal.
ast.target: 在模态框中同时显示句子数和字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include timestamps when displaying word count history in the modal.
ast.target: 在模态框中显示字数历史记录时包含时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For [[note name|alias]] links, only count "alias". For [link text](URL) links, only count "link text". • property: exclude-urls
ast.target: 对于 [[笔记名|别名]] 链接，仅计数“别名”。对于 [链接文本](URL) 链接，仅计数“链接文本”。• 属性：exclude-urls

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, code will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts.
ast.target: 启用后，代码将被排除在字数、字符数和句子数统计之外。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude text within triple backtick (```) or tilde (~~~) code blocks. (Requires code exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-code-blocks
ast.target: 排除三重反引号（```）或波浪号（~~~）代码块内的文本。（需要启用代码排除）• 属性：exclude-code-blocks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude text within single backticks (`). (Requires code exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-inline-code
ast.target: 排除单反引号（`）内的文本。（需要启用代码排除）• 属性：exclude-inline-code

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, file paths will not be counted as words.
ast.target: 启用后，文件路径将不被计为单词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude paths starting with drive letters (e.g., C:\). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • property: exclude-windows-paths
ast.target: 排除以驱动器字母开头的路径（例如，C:\\）。（需要启用路径排除）• 属性：exclude-windows-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude Unix-style paths starting with forward slash (e.g., /usr/local). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • property: exclude-unix-paths
ast.target: 排除以正斜杠开头的 Unix 风格路径（例如，/usr/local）。（需要启用路径排除）• 属性：exclude-unix-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude network paths starting with double backslash (e.g., \\server\share). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • property: exclude-unc-paths
ast.target: 排除以双反斜杠开头的网络路径（例如，\\\\server\\share）。（需要启用路径排除）• 属性：exclude-unc-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude environment variable paths (e.g., %USERPROFILE%, $HOME). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • property: exclude-environment-paths
ast.target: 排除环境变量路径（例如，%USERPROFILE%，$HOME）。（需要启用路径排除）• 属性：exclude-environment-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, comments will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • property: exclude-comments
ast.target: 启用后，评论将从单词、字符和句子计数中排除。 • 属性：exclude-comments

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude Obsidian-style comments from text analysis. (Requires comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 从文本分析中排除 Obsidian 风格的评论。（需要启用评论排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When unchecked, only the comment markers (%% %%) are excluded, but the content inside is still counted. (Requires Obsidian comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 未勾选时，仅排除评论标记（%% %%），但内部内容仍会被计数。（需要启用 Obsidian 评论排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude HTML-style comments from text analysis. (Requires comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 从文本分析中排除 HTML 风格的评论。（需要启用评论排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When unchecked, only the comment markers (<!-- -->) are excluded, but the content inside is still counted. (Requires HTML comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 未勾选时，仅排除评论标记（<!-- -->），但内部内容仍会被计数。（需要启用 HTML 评论排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Markdown headings will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • property: exclude-headings
ast.target: 启用后，Markdown 标题将从单词、字符和句子计数中排除。 • 属性：exclude-headings

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude only the # symbols but count the heading text. (Requires heading exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 仅排除 # 符号，但计入标题文本。（需要启用标题排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude complete heading lines including the text. (Requires heading exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 排除完整的标题行，包括文本。（需要启用标题排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, specific words and phrases will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • property: exclude-words-phrases
ast.target: 启用后，特定单词和短语将从单词、字符和句子计数中排除。 • 属性：exclude-words-phrases

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of words to exclude (case-insensitive, exact matches only). (Requires words/phrases exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的要排除的单词列表（不区分大小写，仅精确匹配）。（需要启用单词/短语排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable detailed logging for troubleshooting. May impact performance.
ast.target: 启用详细日志记录以进行故障排除。可能会影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow custom regex for word detection. For advanced users only.
ast.target: 允许使用自定义正则表达式进行单词检测。仅限高级用户。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自定义选中单词计数插件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 计数选中的单词

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter sample text to test your regex...
ast.target: 输入示例文本以测试您的正则表达式...

ast.name: text
ast.target: 选区分析

ast.name: text
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: text
ast.target: ℹ️ 使用笔记级排除覆盖

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can override any exclusion setting for individual notes by adding a cswc-disable property to the note's frontmatter:
ast.target: 您可以通过在笔记的前置信息中添加 cswc-disable 属性来覆盖任何单个笔记的排除设置：

ast.name: text
ast.target: ---\ncswc-disable: [exclude-urls, exclude-comments]\n---

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用 \"all\" 来禁用所有排除：

ast.name: text
ast.target: ---\ncswc-disable: all\n---

ast.name: text
ast.source: Property values are shown next to each setting below (• property: ...)
ast.target: 属性值显示在下方每个设置旁边（• 属性：...）

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can also disable exclusions for specific sections within a note using comments:
ast.target: 您还可以使用注释来禁用笔记内特定部分的排除：

ast.name: text
ast.source:
This text is excluded.
<!-- cswc-disable -->
This text is NOT excluded from counts.
<!-- cswc-enable -->
This text is excluded again.
ast.target:
此文本被排除。
<!-- cswc-disable -->
此文本未被排除在计数之外。
<!-- cswc-enable -->
此文本再次被排除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supported comment formats: <!-- cswc-disable --> or %% cswc-disable %%
ast.target: 支持的注释格式：<!-- cswc-disable --> 或 %% cswc-disable %%

ast.name: text
ast.target: 已排除的标题部分

ast.name: text
ast.source: Right-click on heading lines to exclude entire sections. (Requires heading exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 右键单击标题行以排除整个部分。（需要启用标题排除）

ast.name: text
ast.source: No excluded heading sections. Right-click on headings to add sections.
ast.target: 没有已排除的标题部分。右键单击标题以添加部分。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 编辑

ast.name: text
ast.target: 删除

ast.name: text
ast.target: 已排除的短语

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select text in any note and right-click to add phrases. (Requires words/phrases exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 在任何笔记中选择文本并右键单击以添加短语。（需要启用单词/短语排除）

ast.name: text
ast.source: No excluded phrases. Right-click selected text to add phrases.
ast.target: 没有已排除的短语。右键单击选中的文本以添加短语。

ast.name: text
ast.target: ⚠️ 自定义单词检测正则表达式（仅限专家）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable and define a custom regex for word detection. Incorrect regex may cause inaccurate counts or performance issues. Use with caution.
ast.target: 启用并定义用于单词检测的自定义正则表达式。不正确的正则表达式可能导致计数不准确或性能问题。请谨慎使用。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重置为默认值

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the box below to see exactly which text fragments your custom regex will match.
ast.target: 使用下方的框来确切查看您的自定义正则表达式将匹配哪些文本片段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重置测试

ast.name: title
ast.target: 清除所有历史记录条目

ast.name: title
ast.target: 复制此计数

ast.target: text
